status: controls obtained-source status and supersedes acquisition assumptions in the base DOI gate
rights_policy: Restricted PDFs remain outside the public repository; only hashes, citations, audit notes, and derived results are committed.

sources.audit_state: full text obtained; Table 1 and Eq. 2 reproduction active; full Haga-Tang below-gap branch still incomplete
sources.authorized_use: source-table carrier-shift reproduction and operational optical-edge consistency test

sources.audit_state: full text obtained; equations audited; native spectrum and fitted covariance absent

sources.audit_state: full text obtained; original piecewise equations and continuity convention audited

chang_multi_thickness_cutoff.reason: Chang 2007 Figure 1 is a calculated cutoff-versus-effective-thickness curve, not an independent measured same-specimen thickness series. Neither paper supplies the native multi-thickness spectra, effective-thickness covariance, or same-specimen W, b, and amplitude needed for the proposed validation.

chang_single_spectrum_absorption.reason: Chang Figure 3 provides a plotted measured Hg0.79Cd0.21Te spectrum at 80 K, but not native data or complete fitted covariance.

dingrong_table1_carrier_edge.reason: The paper supplies one real specimen, Hall density, four temperatures, explicit Eq. 2, source gap inputs, calculated Fermi elevations, and operational optical gaps.
